name: aws-best-practices
description: Unofficial source-linked AWS best practices for every service, organized by Well-Architected pillar and use case. Independent project, not affiliated with AWS.

interface.shortDescription: Unofficial source-linked AWS best practices for every service, by Well-Architected pillar and use case.
interface.longDescription: An independent, unofficial, source-linked collection of AWS best practices for every AWS service, plus cross-service general guidance. Organized so an agent can find what matters for a specific use case (security, reliability, performance, cost, operations, sustainability) without inventing recommendations or researching from scratch. Not affiliated with or endorsed by AWS.
